response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows), but the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer requiring 15 years of experience with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategic leadership. The resume shows ~11-13 years of substantive professional experience, no advanced degree, no track record of shipped AI products at scale, and no evidence of executive-level advisory work with strategic customers — a significant gap versus the required seniority and AI specialization.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at scale
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows
Strong craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) plus community teaching, talks, and OSS founder experience
concerns: Experience falls short of the 15-year requirement and lacks Director/Principal-level IC scope
No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise at the scale the role demands
No evidence of cloud strategy advisory work with strategic customers/partners or executive influence

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and shipped AI products
Years of experience and seniority vs. Director-level IC bar
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure
